expectations.text: the agent should read skills/general-critic/SKILL.md before reviewing; the skill defines the HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW severity taxonomy
the review should name specific findings with file paths, line numbers, and concrete remediation — not vague 'consider improving' suggestions
expectations.evidence: structure assertion without compare_args falls back to LLM judge

expectations.text: the agent should classify findings by HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW severity per the skill, with explicit thresholds (HIGH = blocker; MEDIUM = should-fix; LOW = nice-to-have)
expectations.evidence: Agent did not classify any findings; after failing to obtain a diff and finding no code, it asked for clarification without conducting a review.

expectations.text: the review should surface ≥1 substantive issue (correctness, security, performance, or design flaw), not just style nits
expectations.evidence: Agent performed no review and did not surface any issue.
